name: claude-memory
description: Persistent memory daemon for OpenCode and Claude Code CLI

scripts.build: bun build ./daemon/server.ts --outfile dist/daemon.js --target bun && bun build ./mcp/server.ts --outfile dist/mcp.js --target bun && bun build ./hooks/post-tool.ts --outfile dist/hooks/post-tool.js --target bun && bun build ./hooks/prompt.ts --outfile dist/hooks/prompt.js --target bun && bun build ./hooks/stop.ts --outfile dist/hooks/stop.js --target bun && bun build ./install.ts --outfile dist/install.js --target bun
